title: Console
description: Run allowlisted CLI commands and watch their output live.

demo.title: Available in the local dashboard
demo.hint: The Console runs /apply, /upskill, and salary lookups on your machine and streams their output. That needs the dashboard running locally — it can't work in this static demo. Install CareerForge and launch the dashboard to use it.
